name: On Representation of 3D Rotation in the Context of Deep Learning - arXiv
snippet: This paper investigates various methods of representing 3D rotations and their impact on the learning process of deep neural networks.

name: [PDF] 3D-Rotation-Equivariant Quaternion Neural Networks
